hypothesis: The largest normalized completed-day move among liquid FX pairs contains either short-horizon continuation or reversal information at the London open; selecting only one pair per day creates independent return density without stacking correlated USD positions.

fixed_mechanics.timestamp_conversion: Darwinex broker-wall epoch to UTC to Europe/London
fixed_mechanics.ranking: largest absolute completed-day close return; symbol ascending tie-break
fixed_mechanics.stop_volatility: mean true range of the 288 M5 bars completed before entry
fixed_mechanics.spread_and_commission_basis: fixed conservative current FTMO round-trip points by symbol

selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open exactly one frozen winner only after both preholdout gates pass.

promotion_contract: A holdout survivor remains research-only until Strategy Card approval, allocated EA ID, native deterministic MT5 reconstruction, current-cost reconciliation, exact M15 MAE parity, and dual-fill marginal book validation pass.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
